pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-K-005 (Data Governance/Knowledge) scores 0.411 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.411). Scope is edge_case for Clinical AI Specialist: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Data Governance, composite 0.411. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Governance for Clinical AI Specialist at this seniority?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Governance appears in ~40% of Clinical AI Specialist postings as a secondary competency. Healthcare data governance appears as supporting competency in senior clinical AI profiles. Zero role-specific signals insufficient for inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Data Governance without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. Data Governance without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
